title: I Tried the Open Source ElevenLabs Alternative (Voicebox)
summary: Voicebox is a free open-source local AI voice studio for developers featuring voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, and REST API. The video reviews Voicebox as a privacy-focused, local-first alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs with unlimited generation.
writeup: Better Stack reviews Voicebox, a free open-source AI voice studio that runs locally for developers. The tool combines voice cloning, text-to-speech, system-wide dictation, agent voice output, and a REST API, positioning itself as a privacy-focused, local-first alternative to cloud services like ElevenLabs. Because inference runs on local hardware, generation is unlimited and data stays on-device. Model Context Protocol support extends its use to agent workflows.
